translation: Therefore, one should not hold anything dear, for separation from the beloved is painful. No bonds exist for those to whom nothing is dear or not dear.
literal_translation: Therefore dear not one should make, separation from dear for evil, bonds of them not are found, to whom not is dear-undear.

data.example_1: ekam'antaṃ nisinnā kho tā bhikkhuniyo āyasmantaṃ ānandaṃ etadavocuṃ
data.example_2: idha cunda ekacco anabhijjhālu hoti. yaṃ taṃ parassa paravitt'ūpakaraṇaṃ taṃ anabhijjhitā hoti, aho vata yaṃ parassa taṃ mamassā'ti

data.example_1:
piyappahūtā kalahā vivādā,
paridevasokā sahamaccharā ca,
mān'ātimānā sahapesuṇā ca,
maccherayuttā kalahā vivādā,
vivādajātesu ca pesuṇāni.
data.example_2:
sabbattha munī anissito,
na piyaṃ kubbati no'pi appiyaṃ,
tasmiṃ paridevamaccharaṃ,
paṇṇe vāri yathā na limpati.

data.meaning_1: (adds a question mark) surely?; does one not?
data.meaning_combo: (adds a question mark) surely?; does one not?
data.example_1: yo so, sāriputta, ariyasāvako tathāgate ek'antagato abhippasanno, na so tathāgate vā tathāgatasāsane vā kaṅkheyya vā vicikiccheyya vā'ti?

ehi ramāma supupphite vane.
data.example_2: sace te, kesi, assadammo saṇhena vinayaṃ na upeti, pharusena vinayaṃ na upeti, saṇhapharusena vinayaṃ na upeti, kin'ti naṃ karosī'ti?

data.example_1:
passāmi loke sadhane manusse,
laddhāna vittaṃ na dadanti mohā,
luddhā dhanaṃ sannicayaṃ karonti,
bhiyyo'va kāme abhipatthayanti.
data.example_2: so taṃ thūṇaṃ khaṇḍ'ākhaṇḍikaṃ chindeyya. khaṇḍ'ākhaṇḍikaṃ chetvā phāleyya. phāletvā sakalikaṃ sakalikaṃ kareyya. sakalikaṃ sakalikaṃ katvā vāt'ātape visoseyya. vāt'ātape visosetvā agginā ḍaheyya.

data.example_1: seyyathā'pi, poṭṭhapāda, puriso cātumahāpathe nisseṇiṃ kareyya pāsādassa ārohaṇāya.

components.meaning_1: state of loss; state of misery
components.meaning_combo: state of loss; state of misery; lit. going away
components.example_1: puna caparaṃ, bhikkhave, sapatto sapattassa evaṃ icchati, aho vat'āyaṃ kāyassa bhedā paraṃ maraṇā apāyaṃ duggatiṃ vinipātaṃ nirayaṃ upapajjeyyā'ti! taṃ kissa hetu?
components.example_2: ayaṃ varāko kiñ'c'āpi idāni sukhito susajjito bhoge paribhuñjati, atha kho tīsu dvāresu ekenā'pi katassa kalyāṇakammassa abhāvā idāni apāyesu anappakaṃ dukkhaṃ domanassaṃ paṭisaṃvedissatī'ti.

idha, bhikkhave, khettaṃ unnāmaninnāmi ca hoti, pāsāṇasakkharikañ'ca hoti, ūsarañ'ca hoti, na ca gambhīrasitaṃ hoti, na āyasampannaṃ hoti, na apāyasampannaṃ hoti, na mātikāsampannaṃ hoti, na mariyādasampannaṃ hoti.

components.meaning_combo: decline; deterioration; downfall; ruin; lit. going away
components.example_1:
añña'd'atthuharo mitto,
yo ca mitto vacīparo,
anuppiyañ'ca yo āha,
apāyesu ca yo sakhā.
atha kho bhagavā pānīyaṃ apāyi.
tasmiṃ kho pana, bhikkhave, saṅgāme asurā jiniṃsu, devā parājiniṃsu. parājitā ca kho, bhikkhave, devā apāyaṃsv'eva uttarenamukhā, abhiyaṃsv'eva ne asurā.

data.example_1: taṇhā hi naṃ sibbati tassa tass'eva bhavassa abhinibbattiyā.
data.example_2:
na hi verena verāni,
sammant'īdha kudācanaṃ,
averena ca sammanti,
esa dhammo sanantano.

data.example_1: taggha'si, tāta kumma, khato, taggha upahato. etena hi te, tāta kumma, suttakena pitaro ca pitāmahā ca anayaṃ āpannā byasanaṃ āpannā. gaccha dāni tvaṃ, tāta kumma, na dāni tvaṃ amhākan'ti.
data.example_2:
atthaṅ'gato so uda vā so n'atthi,
udāhu ve sassatiyā arogo,
taṃ me munī sādhu viyākarohi,
tathā hi te vidito esa dhammo.

data.meaning_1: bad; wicked; evil; wrong; worthless; harmful
data.example_1:
sānuṃ pabuddhaṃ vajjāsi,
yakkhānaṃ vacanaṃ idaṃ,
m'ākāsi pāpakaṃ kammaṃ,
āvi vā yadi vā raho.
data.example_2: so sabbehi imehi pāpakehi akusalehi dhammehi visuddham'attānaṃ samanupassati, vimuttam'attānaṃ samanupassati.

data.example_1:
kim'atthakāmo na dade,
kiṃ macco na pariccaje,
kiṃsu muñceyya kalyāṇaṃ,
pāpikaṃ na ca mocaye'ti.
data.example_2:
attānaṃ na dade poso,
attānaṃ na pariccaje,
vācaṃ muñceyya kalyāṇaṃ,
pāpikañ'ca na mocaye'ti.

data.example_1:
taṃ vā'pi ganthaṃ kusalā vadanti,
yaṃ nissito passati hīnam'aññaṃ,
tasmā hi diṭṭhaṃ va sutaṃ mutaṃ vā,
sīlabbataṃ bhikkhu na nissayeyya.
data.example_2:
saññāvirattassa na santi ganthā,
paññāvimuttassa na santi mohā,
saññañ'ca diṭṭhiñ'ca ye aggahesuṃ,
te ghaṭṭayantā vicaranti loke'ti.

data.meaning_combo: book; text; lit. what is tied
data.example_1: tesaṃ'y'eva kho, vāseṭṭha, sattānaṃ ekacce sattā araññ'āyatane paṇṇakuṭīsu taṃ jhānaṃ anabhisambhuṇamānā gāmasāmantaṃ nigamasāmantaṃ osaritvā ganthe karontā acchanti.

ekam'antaṃ nisinnā kho tā bhikkhuniyo āyasmantaṃ ānandaṃ etadavocuṃ
data.example_2: idha cunda ekacco anabhijjhālu hoti. yaṃ taṃ parassa paravitt'ūpakaraṇaṃ taṃ anabhijjhitā hoti, aho vata yaṃ parassa taṃ mamassā'ti

data.example_1:
na antalikkhe na samuddamajjhe,
na pabbatānaṃ vivaraṃ pavissa,
na vijjati so jagatippadeso,
yatthaṭṭhito mucceyya pāpakammā.
data.example_2:
kassako paṭijānāsi,
na ca passāma te kasiṃ,
kasiṃ no pucchito brūhi,
yathā jānemu te kasiṃ.

data.meaning_1: (adds a question mark) surely?; does one not?
data.meaning_combo: (adds a question mark) surely?; does one not?
data.example_1: yo so, sāriputta, ariyasāvako tathāgate ek'antagato abhippasanno, na so tathāgate vā tathāgatasāsane vā kaṅkheyya vā vicikiccheyya vā'ti?

icc'ete aṭṭha dhammā ca,
yassā vijjanti nāriyā,
tam'pi sīlavatiṃ āhu,
dhammaṭṭhaṃ saccavādiniṃ.
data.example_2:
etādis'āyaṃ santāno,
māy'āyaṃ bālalāpinī,
vadhako esa akkhāto,
sāro ettha na vijjati.

data.meaning_combo: is possible; is plausible; lit. exists
data.example_1: aṭṭhānaṃ kho etaṃ, tapassi, anavakāso yaṃ upāli gahapati samaṇassa gotamassa sāvakattaṃ upagaccheyya. ṭhānañ'ca kho etaṃ vijjati yaṃ samaṇo gotamo upālissa gahapatissa sāvakattaṃ upagaccheyya.
yadā arogā ahosi tadā yaṃ iccheyyāsi taṃ dajjeyyāsī'ti
data.example_2:
so bajjhataṃ pāsasatehi chabbhi,
rammā vanā niyyatu rājadhāniṃ,
tuttehi so haññatu pācanehi,
bhisāni te brāhmaṇa yo ahāsi.

data.example_1: yadā arogā ahosi tadā yaṃ iccheyyāsi taṃ dajjeyyāsī'ti

data.meaning_1: is not; it is not; there is not; there is no; there is nothing
data.example_1:
n'atthi jhānaṃ apaññassa,
paññā n'atthi ajhāyato,
yamhi jhānañ'ca paññā ca,
sa ve nibbānasantike.
data.example_2: atthi, bhikkhave, dakkhiṇesu janapadesu dhovanaṃ nāma. tattha hoti annam'pi pānam'pi khajjam'pi bhojjam'pi leyyam'pi peyyam'pi naccam'pi gītam'pi vāditam'pi. atth'etaṃ, bhikkhave, dhovanaṃ, n'etaṃ n'atthī'ti vadāmi.

data.meaning_1: is not; it is not; there is not; there is no; there is nothing
data.meaning_combo: is not; it is not; there is not; there is no; there is nothing
data.example_1:
n'atthi jhānaṃ apaññassa,
paññā n'atthi ajhāyato,
yamhi jhānañ'ca paññā ca,
sa ve nibbānasantike.
data.example_2: atthi, bhikkhave, dakkhiṇesu janapadesu dhovanaṃ nāma. tattha hoti annam'pi pānam'pi khajjam'pi bhojjam'pi leyyam'pi peyyam'pi naccam'pi gītam'pi vāditam'pi. atth'etaṃ, bhikkhave, dhovanaṃ, n'etaṃ n'atthī'ti vadāmi.

data.meaning_1: does not exist; no longer exists
data.meaning_combo: does not exist; no longer exists
data.example_1: sabbaṃ atthī'ti kho, kaccāna, ayam'eko anto. sabbaṃ n'atthī'ti ayaṃ dutiyo anto. ete te, kaccāna, ubho ante anupagamma majjhena tathāgato dhammaṃ deseti
data.example_2:
atthaṅ'gato so uda vā so n'atthi,
udāhu ve sassatiyā arogo,
taṃ me munī sādhu viyākarohi,
tathā hi te vidito esa dhammo?

data.meaning_1: does not exist; no longer exists
data.meaning_combo: does not exist; no longer exists
data.example_1: sabbaṃ atthī'ti kho, kaccāna, ayam'eko anto. sabbaṃ n'atthī'ti ayaṃ dutiyo anto. ete te, kaccāna, ubho ante anupagamma majjhena tathāgato dhammaṃ deseti

udāhu ve sassatiyā arogo,
taṃ me munī sādhu viyākarohi,
tathā hi te vidito esa dhammo?

data.meaning_1: beloved and unloved; pleasant and unpleasant
data.example_1:
saddañ'ca sutvā dubhayaṃ piy'āppiyaṃ,
piyamhi sadde na samucchito siyā,
atho'ppiye dosagataṃ vinodaye,
na c'āppiyaṃ me'ti manaṃ padosaye.
data.example_2:
tasmā piyaṃ na kayirātha,
piy'āpāyo hi pāpako,
ganthā tesaṃ na vijjanti,
yesaṃ n'atthi piy'āppiya.

components.example_1:
sabbe tasanti daṇḍassa,
sabbesaṃ jīvitaṃ piyaṃ,
attānaṃ upamaṃ katvā,
na haneyya na ghātaye.
components.example_2: manussānaṃ piyo hoti, amanussānaṃ piyo hoti, devatā rakkhanti, n'āssa aggi vā visaṃ vā satthaṃ vā kamati, tuvaṭaṃ cittaṃ samādhiyati, mukhavaṇṇo vippasīdati

components.example_1:
piyappahūtā kalahā vivādā,
paridevasokā sahamaccharā ca,
mān'ātimānā sahapesuṇā ca,
maccherayuttā kalahā vivādā,
vivādajātesu ca pesuṇāni.
components.example_2:
sabbattha munī anissito,
na piyaṃ kubbati no'pi appiyaṃ,
tasmiṃ paridevamaccharaṃ,
paṇṇe vāri yathā na limpati.

components.example_1:
mā piyehi samāgañchi,
appiyehi kudācanaṃ,
piyānaṃ adassanaṃ dukkhaṃ,
appiyānañ'ca dassanaṃ.
components.example_2:
sabbattha munī anissito,
na piyaṃ kubbati no'pi appiyaṃ,
tasmiṃ paridevamaccharaṃ,
paṇṇe vāri yathā na limpati.

components.example_1:
na taṃ yāce yassa piyaṃ jigiṃse,
desso hoti atiyācanāya,
nāgo maṇiṃ yācito brāhmaṇena,
adassanaṃ'y'eva tadajjhagamā'ti.
components.example_2:
piyato jāyatī soko,
piyato jāyatī bhayaṃ,
piyato vippamuttassa,
n'atthi soko kuto bhayaṃ.

components.example_1:
ovadeyy'ānusāseyya,
asabbhā ca nivāraye,
satañ'hi so piyo hoti,
asataṃ hoti appiyo.
components.example_2: ye ca kho keci kāyena duccaritaṃ caranti vācāya duccaritaṃ caranti manasā duccaritaṃ caranti tesaṃ appiyo attā

components.example_1: yañ'hi appiyo appiyassa kareyya, taṃ te attanā'va attano karonti, tasmā tesaṃ appiyo attā.
components.example_2:
sabbattha munī anissito,
na piyaṃ kubbati no'pi appiyaṃ,
tasmiṃ paridevamaccharaṃ,
paṇṇe vāri yathā na limpati.

components.example_1: evam'eva kho, rājakumāra, yaṃ tathāgato vācaṃ jānāti abhūtaṃ atacchaṃ anatthasaṃhitaṃ sā ca paresaṃ appiyā amanāpā, na taṃ tathāgato vācaṃ bhāsati.

piyato jāyatī bhayaṃ,
piyato vippamuttassa,
n'atthi soko kuto bhayaṃ.

components.example_1:
ovadeyy'ānusāseyya,
asabbhā ca nivāraye,
satañ'hi so piyo hoti,
asataṃ hoti appiyo.
components.example_2: ye ca kho keci kāyena duccaritaṃ caranti vācāya duccaritaṃ caranti manasā duccaritaṃ caranti tesaṃ appiyo attā

components.example_1: yañ'hi appiyo appiyassa kareyya, taṃ te attanā'va attano karonti, tasmā tesaṃ appiyo attā.
components.example_2:
sabbattha munī anissito,
na piyaṃ kubbati no'pi appiyaṃ,
tasmiṃ paridevamaccharaṃ,
paṇṇe vāri yathā na limpati.

components.example_1: evam'eva kho, rājakumāra, yaṃ tathāgato vācaṃ jānāti abhūtaṃ atacchaṃ anatthasaṃhitaṃ sā ca paresaṃ appiyā amanāpā, na taṃ tathāgato vācaṃ bhāsati.

data.meaning_1: friend or foe; dear or unloved person
data.meaning_combo: friend or foe; dear or unloved person
data.example_1:
tasmā piyaṃ na kayirātha,
piy'āpāyo hi pāpako,
ganthā tesaṃ na vijjanti,
yesaṃ n'atthi piy'āppiyaṃ

components.example_1:
sabbe tasanti daṇḍassa,
sabbesaṃ jīvitaṃ piyaṃ,
attānaṃ upamaṃ katvā,
na haneyya na ghātaye.
components.example_2: manussānaṃ piyo hoti, amanussānaṃ piyo hoti, devatā rakkhanti, n'āssa aggi vā visaṃ vā satthaṃ vā kamati, tuvaṭaṃ cittaṃ samādhiyati, mukhavaṇṇo vippasīdati

components.example_1:
piyappahūtā kalahā vivādā,
paridevasokā sahamaccharā ca,
mān'ātimānā sahapesuṇā ca,
maccherayuttā kalahā vivādā,
vivādajātesu ca pesuṇāni.
components.example_2:
sabbattha munī anissito,
na piyaṃ kubbati no'pi appiyaṃ,
tasmiṃ paridevamaccharaṃ,
paṇṇe vāri yathā na limpati.

components.example_1:
mā piyehi samāgañchi,
appiyehi kudācanaṃ,
piyānaṃ adassanaṃ dukkhaṃ,
appiyānañ'ca dassanaṃ.
components.example_2:
sabbattha munī anissito,
na piyaṃ kubbati no'pi appiyaṃ,
tasmiṃ paridevamaccharaṃ,
paṇṇe vāri yathā na limpati.

components.example_1:
na taṃ yāce yassa piyaṃ jigiṃse,
desso hoti atiyācanāya,
nāgo maṇiṃ yācito brāhmaṇena,
adassanaṃ'y'eva tadajjhagamā'ti.
components.example_2:
piyato jāyatī soko,
piyato jāyatī bhayaṃ,
piyato vippamuttassa,
n'atthi soko kuto bhayaṃ.

asabbhā ca nivāraye,
satañ'hi so piyo hoti,
asataṃ hoti appiyo.
components.example_2: ye ca kho keci kāyena duccaritaṃ caranti vācāya duccaritaṃ caranti manasā duccaritaṃ caranti tesaṃ appiyo attā

components.example_1: yañ'hi appiyo appiyassa kareyya, taṃ te attanā'va attano karonti, tasmā tesaṃ appiyo attā.
components.example_2:
sabbattha munī anissito,

tasmiṃ paridevamaccharaṃ,
